name: Mika Voice Agent — Call Today's Pending Reservations
_note: Sanitized export — logic only, NO credentials. Supabase project ref + ElevenLabs agent/phone IDs are placeholders (YOUR-...); attach your own n8n credentials (Supabase API + ElevenLabs httpHeaderAuth) on import. The n8n credential store holds the real keys — they are never part of this JSON.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_id: 'YOUR-ELEVENLABS-AGENT-ID', agent_phone_number_id: 'YOUR-ELEVENLABS-PHONE-NUMBER-ID', to_number: $json.to_number, conversation_initiation_client_data: { dynamic_variables: $json.dynamic_variables } }) }}
